changes.summary: Re-export UpdateTappalkaSettingsInputSchema and UpdateTappalkaSettingsInput from ./tappalka into the schemas barrel alongside UpdateCommunityDtoSchema (ST-3 canonical community-update path).
Added communities.updateTappalkaSettings protectedProcedure using UpdateTappalkaSettingsInputSchema; delegates to communityService.updateCommunity with tappalkaSettings partial.

verification.orphan_status: wired — schema import used by communities.updateTappalkaSettings

notes: Frontend continues to use communities.update with UpdateCommunityDtoSchema.tappalkaSettings; new procedure provides typed BC-13 admin path and retires the unused export. Definition remains in tappalka.ts; schemas.ts re-export prepares index.ts barrel migration off the tappalka-only export block.
